description: You encounter a hostile group of looters!
A pack of feral dogs attacks!
You hear strange noises in the distance.
A mysterious mist envelops the area.
You stumble upon an old campsite.
You find a hidden cache of supplies.
A sudden rainstorm forces you to take shelter.
You come across an abandoned vehicle.
You discover a torn map with a mysterious location marked.
You stumble upon a makeshift campfire.
